title: Five More Minutes
lyrics:
[verse 1]
My toes are snoozin’ tight!
My T-Rex says, "No way!"
The sun’s still hidin’—*boom!*
The night-light’s still on, yay!

[chorus]
Five more minutes, please!
Five more, just for me!
One more little snooze—
Then up I’ll jump with glee!

[verse 2]
My blanket’s in a *splat*!
My pillow’s on the floor.
The clock went *tick-tock* wrong—
I heard it *ding* once more!

[chorus]
Five more minutes, please!
Five more, just for me!
One more little snooze—
Then up I’ll jump with glee!

[ending]
Five more... *yawn*... okay...
Five more... zzz... I’ll stay...
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, xylophone and tambourine, 116 BPM, bouncy but thoughtful, groove with space to think, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
scene: 6:47 a.m., dim glow from the Elmo night-light in the corner of the toddler’s room. You just pulled the dinosaur blanket off and said, "Time to get up, sweetie," and he clutches the stuffed T-Rex to his chest, eyes still half-closed.
cover_description: Sleepy toddler hugging T-Rex under a dinosaur blanket, one toe peeking out as the Elmo night-light glows.
